div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 544px; height: 1px; padding-top: 85px; margin-left: 1121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 32px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
假如0、1、2、3被调度上了
那么需要读取20个A/B Tile到SRAM。
并且B Tile的个数很多，可能导致
L2缓存命中率下降

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 544px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1085px; margin-left: 1071px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 32px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 如果是这种分组的情况，那么只用读取16个Tile。并且访问更密集，缓存命中可能更优

switch.text: 如果是这种分组的情况，那么只用读取16个Tile。并且访问更密集，缓存命中可能更优

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 544px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2045px; margin-left: 1107px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 32px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 但是这只是理论情况。现实中，哪个块被调度上SM是随机的，也可能是离得很远的C Tile。这时候按组排布提升空间也有限。并不能作为完全有效的优化

switch.text: 但是这只是理论情况。现实中，哪个块被调度上SM是随机的，也可能是离得很远的C Tile。这时候按组排布提升空间也有限。并不能作为完全有效的优化

div.div:
first_pid_m=group_id*GROUP_SIZE_M
=1*2=2
本组在m方向的开始下标索引

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2540px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
group_size_m=min(num_pid_m-first_pid_m,GROUP_SIZE_M)
=min(4-2,2)=2
本组m方向的长度。因为有可能整个C矩阵num_pid_m不够最好一个租的GROUP_SIZE_M，可能会截断

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2900px; margin-left: 907px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
font-family: Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-weight: normal; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px; white-space: pre;
div.div:
pid%num_pid_in_group=12%8=4;含义是这个program在组内的顺序索引
((pid % num_pid_in_group) % group_size_m)意思是里组内的m方向偏移。
因为组内是列优先，所有求行偏移是用%group_size_m的方式
再加上first_pid_m即为全局的m方向下标

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 3015px; margin-left: 886px;

font-family: Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-weight: normal; font-size: 14px; line-height: 19px; white-space: pre;
div.div:
((pid % num_pid_in_group) // group_size_m)意思是里组内的n方向偏移。
因为组内是列优先，所有求列偏移是用//group_size_m的方式
